query:
-- 查找所有没有默认批次的产品
SELECT p.id, p.sku, p.name, COUNT(pv.id) as variant_count
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId
WHERE p.id NOT IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT productId 
  FROM product_variants 
  WHERE isDefault = 1
)
GROUP BY p.id, p.sku, p.name
HAVING variant_count > 0
LIMIT 10;

-- 查找所有没有默认批次的产品
SELECT p.id, p.sku, p.name, COUNT(pv.id) as variant_count
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId
WHERE p.id NOT IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT productId 
  FROM product_variants 
  WHERE isDefault = 1
)
GROUP BY p.id, p.sku, p.name
HAVING variant_count > 0
LIMIT 10;
